mapper.sql: `id`, executor_name executorName, executor_address executorAddress, heartbeat_time heartbeatTime, `status`, create_time createTime
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO executor_info (executor_name, executor_address, status) VALUES (#{executorName}, #{executorAddress}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = 1, executor_address = VALUES(executor_address), heartbeat_time = NOW()
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM executor_info WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY executor_name ASC, executor_address ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE executor_info SET status = 0 WHERE heartbeat_time < date_sub(now(), interval 30 second)
